{{Quote|Acix Ileo, you have been sentenced as an enemy of the Empire; I will be your executioner!|Aralina Silk, to [[Acix Ileo]]|<ref name="Galactic Hunters">{{SWGTCG|set=Galactic Hunters|cardname=Jinzu Razor}}</ref>}}
'''Aralina Silk''' was one of the infamous [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hands]], one of many [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] agents used by [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to undertake whatever missions the Emperor wished them to do.

==Biography==
[[File:Jinzu_Razor_SWGTCG.png|left|thumb|Silk wielding her Jinsu Razor saber]]
She was present in [[Restuss]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Rori/Legends|Rori]] at the time of the [[Battle of Restuss]], where she was presumably killed by an unknown squad of [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]]. It was not known what exactly her mission was, but she had no qualms with killing [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] as well as [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] in her efforts to accomplish it. Her [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], a [[Jinsu Razor]], was taken by a Force-sensitive member of that squad.

==Behind the scenes==
She was introduced with the Restuss live event for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.
